error_string: State: Terminated, Reason: Error, Exit Code: 2

required_files.rationale: Contains the prober worker logic that fails to restart containers when sidecar is still running. The bug is in the restart decision logic.
Test file updated in fix PR to cover the sidecar restart scenario.

sufficient_files.rationale: E2E test added for the container lifecycle with sidecar scenario.

error_chain: Container exits with non-zero code (Reason: Error)
Kubelet prober worker evaluates restart policy
Prober worker checks if sidecar container is running
Bug: worker skips restart when sidecar is still alive
Container stays in Terminated state indefinitely
trigger_conditions: Pod has both regular containers and sidecar containers (native sidecars)
RestartPolicy allows restart but prober doesn't trigger it
